title: Uton Optimizator
description: Effective optimization for weak PCs and even for mobile devices.
body:
# Uton — Pure Performance, Zero Compromise

**Uton** is an optimization modpack with one goal: **maximum FPS without touching vanilla.**
No visual changes. No broken mechanics. Just a faster, smoother Minecraft.

---

## 🎯 What makes Uton different?

Most optimization packs either change how the game looks, break vanilla behavior, or only support one mod loader. **Uton does none of that.**

- ✅ Vanilla graphics preserved — no downgraded textures or lighting
- ✅ Vanilla logic untouched — redstone, mobs, and mechanics work exactly as Mojang intended
- ✅ 100+ releases of testing for stable frametimes and minimal micro-stutters
- ✅ No extra features — just pure optimization, nothing more

---

## 🔧 Multi-Loader Support

| Loader | Supported |
|--------|-----------|
| Fabric | ✅ |
| Quilt | ✅ |
| Forge | ✅ |
| NeoForge | ✅ |

---

## 🗂️ Supported Minecraft Versions

Supports a wide range of Minecraft versions — from 1.7.10 to 1.21.x, including key releases such as 1.12.2, 1.16.5, 1.18.2, 1.19.4, 1.20.1, and the latest 1.21.x versions.

---

## 🏗️ Pack Architecture

Uton is not just a collection of mods thrown together. Every version is built on a defined architecture — a carefully selected and tested set of mods that work together as a system.

| Architecture | Versions | Description |
|---|---|---|
| **LPA-1** | 1.7.10, 1.8.9, 1.12.2 | Legacy Pack Architecture. Built for old Forge environments where modern optimization mods don't exist. Stable enough for daily use. |
| **MPA-3** | 1.16.5–1.21.11 | Mod Pack Architecture. Modern optimization — Sodium, Lithium, and compatible companions. Covers a wide range of versions with consistent performance. |
| **MPA-4** | 1.20.1–1.21.11, 26.x | Current generation architecture. Expanded mod selection including newer discoveries like Noisium and Signs Faster. More powerful optimization than MPA-3 with better balanced FPS. Replaces MPA-3 on supported versions. |

> Each architecture is independently tested. Updating Uton to the latest release for your version and loader is always recommended to get the current architecture.

---

## 📊 How does it compare?

| | UO | FO | SO | Photon Optimizer | OptiFine |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Multi-loader | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Vanilla look | ✅ | ❌ | ➖ | ✅ | ➖ |
| Stutter reduction focus | ✅ | ➖ | ✅ | ➖ | ➖ |
| No extra features | ✅ | ➖ | ❌ | ➖ | ❌ |
| Raw FPS | 🥇 | 🥈 | 🥈 | 🥇 | 🥉 |
| FPS stability | 🥇 | 🥈 | 🥈 | 🥉 | 🥉 |
| Server FPS | 🥇 | 🥈 | 🥇 | 🥉 | 🥉 |
| Moddability | 🥈 | 🥉 | 🥈 | 🥇 | 🥉 |
| Features | 🥉 | 🥇 | 🥈 | 🥉 | 🥈 |

---

## ⚠️ This project is changing the plans for the "MPA-4" architecture. Uton will now have additional features similar to FO or Optifine, and the default features will not impact performance! Changes took effect in version "Uton 1.4.0 for Minecraft 26.1.2 Fabric/Quilt".
---

# Mods in Uton:
"Mercurizer" by @Zellior.
